entities.name: .base
entities.context: The base address of the network block.

entities.name: .hostmask
entities.context: The host mask which is the opposite of the netmask.

entities.name: .bitmask
entities.context: The netmask as a number of bits in the network portion of the address.

entities.name: .size
entities.context: The number of IP addresses in a block.

entities.name: .contains
entities.context: Method to check if an IP is part of the network.

entities.name: .forEach
entities.context: Method to loop through all usable addresses.

entities.name: .next
entities.context: Method to return the next block of the same size.

entities.name: .toString
entities.context: Method to format the netmask in base/bitmask format.
